id.title: YouTube Video ID
id.description: The 11-character YouTube video ID to fetch a transcript for.

language.title: Transcript Language
language.description: Preferred transcript or translation language code, such as en, es, de, or fr. Leave empty to use YouTube's default transcript.

hl.title: Interface Language
hl.description: Two-letter YouTube interface language code used for transcript metadata.

gl.title: Country
gl.description: Two-letter country code used for YouTube localization.

debug.title: Debug
debug.description: Include Scrappa debug metadata when available.
